india_trends.title: Singapore emerges as top FDI source in Apr-Dec FY26, high inflows from tax havens
india_trends.summary: Singapore emerged as the top source of FDI equity inflows into India during April-December FY26, contributing $17.6 billion. india_trends.title: Gold, silver rates today: Comex gold jumps $109/oz, silver surges $4.5/oz as Strait of Hormuz reopens
india_trends.summary: Precious metals saw gains on 17 April as safe-haven sentiment improved after Iran reopened the Strait of Hormuz, easing inflation concerns. Gold rose $109 to $4,917 and silver surged $4.53 to $83.24.&nbsp;

india_trends.summary: Just ahead of pivotal updates concerning the Strait of Hormuz and Iran, lucrative oil trades totaling millions were executed, raising eyebrows among U.S. officials. india_trends.title: Punjab to integrate AI as core subject in schools, marks to reflect on Board certificates
india_trends.summary: Punjab's school education board will integrate Artificial Intelligence as a core component of its curriculum, with learning outcomes to be reflected on student certificates. india_trends.title: Need innovative solutions to finance nuclear projects: Official
india_trends.summary: India is planning a significant expansion of its nuclear energy sector. Experts emphasize the need for new financial strategies and robust risk-sharing frameworks. The SHANTI Act of 2025 is enabling private sector involvement. Accelerating site studies and ensuring long-term fuel supply are crucial

india_trends.title: Banks' NPAs hold steady despite war shake-up, shows Crisil stress test
india_trends.summary: The US-Iran war, which started on 28 February 2026, has hit global supply chains, especially in energy, leading to a cascade effect across the economy, putting pressure on inflation as well as growth.

india_trends.title: India explores FTA full use with Norway, sets up fast-track investment system with Austria
india_trends.summary: India and Norway are enhancing cooperation in energy, maritime, and biotech sectors. Norway sees growing investment interest in India. india_trends.title: Zee Entertainment to invest up to Rs 116 crore in VFX studio PhantomFX
india_trends.summary: Zee Entertainment Enterprises is investing up to Rs 116 crore in Phantom Digital Effects Ltd. to expand into the AVGC segment. This strategic move aims to enhance Zee's content creation capabilities across platforms and genres by leveraging PhantomFX's global expertise and AI-integrated production.

india_trends.title: UltraTech crosses 200 million tonne capacity in India
india_trends.summary: UltraTech Cement has achieved a significant milestone, crossing 200 million tonnes in production capacity in India. india_trends.title: Smartworks bets on structural shift as managed offices become mainstream
india_trends.summary: India's managed office sector is entering a period of strong growth. Smartworks, a leading platform, is expanding rapidly with large campus formats. india_trends.title: West Asia crisis: Govt expands export insurance scheme

india_trends.title: Trent to consider bonus, dividend along with Q4 results on this date. Check details
india_trends.summary: On April 22, 2026, Trent's board will review Q4 FY26 financials, potential interim dividends, and the introduction of bonus shares and an ESOP. After remaining under pressure for a prolonged period, shares of the Tata Group company staged a strong rebound in April, rising 24.63% so far.&nbsp;

india_trends.title: Dish TV appoints three independent directors with shareholder approval
india_trends.summary: Dish TV India shareholders overwhelmingly approved the appointment of three independent directors, signaling strong confidence in the company's strategic direction.
